title: Vanilla Sharp
description: An technical modpack designed with vanilla in mind.
body:
# Vanilla Sharp
## What is V#?
V# is a modpack that I created with technically focused mods in mind. Even though a lot of the mods included will be most utilized by Minecraft engineers, pretty much anyone can find fun in it.

## Other Information
All information, Including the mods list can be found on the GitHub page.

Attribution on [source](https://github.com/gam3rboy7/Vanilla-Sharp) page!
